folio.label: 57v
folio.l: O . Mars . o Athasir , as in this cas

note.notetxt: 207this folio is in light brown. I cannot be sure that it is the same ink used in the former folio, but the difference can be clarified on f. 58r. This is the very same ink used in CO.ODR

folio.l: O feble Mone , vnhappy ben thy paas
Thow knyttest the , there æè art nougút receyued
There æè were wel , fro thens art æè weyued
¢ Imprudent Em¹our , of Rome , Allas
Was æere no philosophre , in al thy toune
Is no tyme bet than other , in swicú a caas
Of viage , is æäe noon eleccione
Namely to folk , of heigú condicione
Nougút whan a root , is of birthe I knowe
Allas we ben to lewed , or to slowe
¢ To shippe is brougút , this wooful fair mayde
Solempnely , with euery circumstaunce
Now iúu crist , be witú ©ow alle she sayde
There nys namore , but fare wel fair Custaunce
She peyneth hire , to make good countenaunce
And fortú I lete hire seyle , in this manere
And turne I wyl a geyn , to my matere
¢ The moder of the Soudan , welle of vices
A spied hatú , hire sones pleyn entent
How he wolde lete , his olde sacrifys
And rigút a noon , she for hire counseil sent
And they ben come , to knowe what she ment´
And wham assembled was , this folk in fere
She sette hire doun , and seyde as ©e shuln here
¢ Lordes she seide , ©e knowen euäychone
How that my sone , in poynt is for to lete
The holy lawes , of oure Alkarone
ñouen by goddes messanger , Macamete
But oon a vow , to grete god I hete
The lif shal rather , out of my body stert
Er MacametesMacameteMacameteslawe , out of myn hert
¢ What shulde vs tiden , of this newe lawe
But thraldome to oure bodies , and penaunce
And afterward in helle , to ben drawe
For we reneyed Mahoun , oure creaunce
But lordes wol ©e maken , asseuraunce
As I shal seyn , assentyngö to my loore
And I shal make vs saf , for euäe more
¢ They sworn~ & assentyn , euäy man
To lyue w hire & deye , & by hire stonde
And euericú , in the best wise , he can
To strengthe hire , shal alle hise frendes fonde
And she hatú this emprise , I take on honde
Whicú ©e shal heren , that I shal deuyse
